title: taraxacum buttleri
intro: Taraxacum buttleri, also known as the lesser dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties due to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum buttleri include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum buttleri can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a treatment for various health conditions.
